    def get_date(value: object | None) -> SafeDatetime | None:
        if value in (None, ""):
            return None
        if isinstance(value, _dt.datetime):
            return SafeDatetime(value.year, value.month, value.day, value.hour, value.minute, value.second, value.microsecond, value.tzinfo)
        if isinstance(value, _dt.date):
            return SafeDatetime(value.year, value.month, value.day)
        text = str(value).strip()
        for suffix in ("Z", "z"):
            if text.endswith(suffix):
                text = text[:-1] + "+00:00"
        candidates = [
            "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S",
            "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M",
            "%Y-%m-%d",
            "%Y/%m/%d %H:%M:%S",
            "%Y/%m/%d %H:%M",
            "%Y/%m/%d",
            "%d-%m-%Y",
            "%m/%d/%Y",
        ]
        try:
            parsed = _dt.datetime.fromisoformat(text)
            return SafeDatetime(parsed.year, parsed.month, parsed.day, parsed.hour, parsed.minute, parsed.second, parsed.microsecond, parsed.tzinfo)
        except ValueError:
            pass
        for fmt in candidates:
            try:
                parsed = _dt.datetime.strptime(text, fmt)
                return SafeDatetime(parsed.year, parsed.month, parsed.day, parsed.hour, parsed.minute, parsed.second)
            except ValueError:
                continue

    def get_date(value: object | None) -> SafeDatetime | None:
        if value in (None, ""):
            return None
        if isinstance(value, _dt.datetime):
            return SafeDatetime(value.year, value.month, value.day, value.hour, value.minute, value.second, value.microsecond, value.tzinfo)
        if isinstance(value, _dt.date):
            return SafeDatetime(value.year, value.month, value.day)
        text = str(value).strip()
        for suffix in ("Z", "z"):
            if text.endswith(suffix):
                text = text[:-1] + "+00:00"
        candidates = [
            "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S",
            "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M",
            "%Y-%m-%d",
            "%Y/%m/%d %H:%M:%S",
            "%Y/%m/%d %H:%M",
            "%Y/%m/%d",
            "%d-%m-%Y",
            "%m/%d/%Y",
        ]
        try:
            parsed = _dt.datetime.fromisoformat(text)
            return SafeDatetime(parsed.year, parsed.month, parsed.day, parsed.hour, parsed.minute, parsed.second, parsed.microsecond, parsed.tzinfo)
        except ValueError:
            pass
        for fmt in candidates:
            try:
                parsed = _dt.datetime.strptime(text, fmt)
                return SafeDatetime(parsed.year, parsed.month, parsed.day, parsed.hour, parsed.minute, parsed.second)
            except ValueError:
                continue
